service.name: Anthropic API — Free Tier Access
service.description_for_ai: Anthropic provides free tier access to Claude models via API. Claude Haiku 4.5 has the most generous free usage. No credit card required to start. Best free frontier AI API alongside Gemini.

auth.how_to_get: Register at https://console.anthropic.com — no credit card required for free tier
auth.cost: Free tier available. Claude Haiku 4.5: $0.80/$4 per 1M tokens when paid

capabilities.description_for_ai: Send messages to Claude AI. Free tier available without credit card. Best for: analysis, writing, coding, Q&A in Russian, English, and 100+ languages.

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in response
